message:
Command `# state_out.json is clean. The 8afc8346 must come from the _env.tcl files used by OpenROAD steps
# or from librelane re-resolving config.json with --from.
# Let's check _env.tcl from step 49 
grep "8afc8346" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v3/49-openroad-stamidpnr/_env.tcl 2>/dev/null | wc -l
echo "---check step 38 _env.tcl---"
grep "8afc8346" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v3/38-openroad-generatepdn/_env.tcl 2>/dev/null | wc -l

# Maybe the issue is librelane is reading the _env.tcl from the WRONG python env
# Let's check if it validates paths from the resolved config before even using the step dirs
# Try running without --from to see if pnr_run_v3 was created fresh
ls /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v3/ | head -5` executed with exit code 0.
